	audio_tier = 2
	is_special = no
	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = burghers
	max_levels = guild_max_level
	startup_ramp_target = guild_startup_ramp_target
	category = basic_industry_category
	employment_size = guild_employment
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes
	build_time = guild_build_time
	modifier = {
		local_production_efficiency = 0.02
	}
	unique_production_methods = {
		antq_reg_olive_press_maintenance = {
			olives = 0.16
			pottery = 0.05
			tools = 0.04
			lumber = 0.03
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	custom_tags = { guild }
	construction_demand = guild_construction
}

	startup_ramp_target = guild_startup_ramp_target
	category = consumer_goods_category
	employment_size = guild_employment
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes
	build_time = guild_build_time
	modifier = {
		local_merchant_capacity = 0.01
	}
	unique_production_methods = {
		antq_reg_basketry_maintenance = {
			lumber = 0.9817
			dyes = 0.1468
			tools = 0.1468
			produced = furniture
			output = 1
			debug_max_profit = guild_profit_margin
			category = guild_input
		}
	}
	custom_tags = { guild }
	construction_demand = guild_construction
}

			output = 1

			category = guild_input
		}
	}

	megalopolis = yes
	build_time = guild_build_time
	modifier = {
		local_production_efficiency = 0.02
	}
	unique_production_methods = {
		antq_reg_barge_chandlery_maintenance = {
			lumber = 0.1963
			fiber_crops = 0.4906
			tar = 0.5393
			cloth = 0.0486
			produced = naval_supplies
			output = 1
			debug_max_profit = guild_profit_margin
			category = guild_input
		}
	}
	custom_tags = { guild }
	construction_demand = guild_construction
}
